name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = i
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages


  sendPrepare() == 
    LET prepareMsg == [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> 0, to |-> i] IN
    messages' = Append(messages, prepareMsg)
  (* Participants respond with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
  participantResponds(i) == 
    LET voteMsg == [type |-> IF Random < 0.5 THEN "VoteYes" ELSE "VoteNo", from |-> i, to |-> 0] IN
    messages' = Append(messages, voteMsg)
  (* Coordinator decides to Commit or Abort *)
  coordinatorDecides() == 
    LET allYes == \A msg \in messages : msg.type = "VoteYes" IN

      messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> i])

      messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", from |-> 0, to |-> i])
  (* Participants update state based on messages *)
  participantUpdates(i) == 
    LET msg == [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> i] IN
    messages' = Append(messages, msg)
  (* Coordinator updates state based on messages *)
  coordinatorUpdates() == 
    LET msg == [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> i] IN
    messages' = Append(messages, msg)
  (* Main process *)
  main == 
    sendPrepare() \* Coordinator sends Prepare
    \* Participants respond
    \* Coordinator decides
    coordinatorDecides() \* Coordinator decides Commit or Abort
    \* Participants update state
    \* Coordinator updates state
  (* Next action *)
  Next == 
    \* Coordinator sends Prepare
    \* Participants respond
    \* Coordinator decides
    \* Participants update state
    \* Coordinator updates state
  (* Init action *)
  Init == 
    /\ participants = <<[id |-> i, state |-> "Init"] : i \in 1..N>>
    /\ coordinator = [id |-> 0, state |-> "Init"]
    /\ messages = <<>>
  (* Spec *)
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
  (* TypeOK *)
  TypeOK == 
    /\ participants \in <<[id |-> Int, state |-> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}] : i \in 1..N>>
    /\ coordinator \in [id |-> Int, state |-> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
    /\ messages \in <<[type |-> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, from |-> Int, to |-> Int] : i \in 1..N>>
  (* Variables *)
  vars == <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  (* Spec *)
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
  (* Invariant *)
  Invariant == 
    /\ coordinator.state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : p \in <<[id |-> i, state |-> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}] : i \in 1..N>>
  (* TLC configuration *)
  CONSTRAINT TypeOK
  ====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm + 1}
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

       /\ chosenBallotValue' = chosenBallotValue
       /\ chosenValueBallot' = chosenValueBallot

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E k \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![k] = offsets[k] + (clocks[j] - clocks[k])]
        /\ \E l \in 1..N \ {i, j} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![l] = offsets[l] + (clocks[k] - clocks[l])]
        /\ \E m \in 1..N \ {i, j, k} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![m] = offsets[m] + (clocks[l] - clocks[m])]
        /\ \E n \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![n] = offsets[n] + (clocks[m] - clocks[n])]
        /\ \E o \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![o] = offsets[o] + (clocks[n] - clocks[o])]
        /\ \E p \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![p] = offsets[p] + (clocks[o] - clocks[p])]
        /\ \E q \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![q] = offsets[q] + (clocks[p] - clocks[q])]
        /\ \E r \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![r] = offsets[r] + (clocks[q] - clocks[r])]
        /\ \E s \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![s] = offsets[s] + (clocks[r] - clocks[s])]
        /\ \E t \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![t] = offsets[t] + (clocks[s] - clocks[t])]
        /\ \E u \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![u] = offsets[u] + (clocks[t] - clocks[u])]
        /\ \E v \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![v] = offsets[v] + (clocks[u] - clocks[v])]
        /\ \E w \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![w] = offsets[w] + (clocks[v] - clocks[w])]
        /\ \E x \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![x] = offsets[x] + (clocks[w] - clocks[x])]
        /\ \E y \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![y] = offsets[y] + (clocks[x] - clocks[y])]
        /\ \E z \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![z] = offsets[z] + (clocks[y] - clocks[z])]
        /\ \E a \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![a] = offsets[a] + (clocks[z] - clocks[a])]
        /\ \E b \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![b] = offsets[b] + (clocks[a] - clocks[b])]
        /\ \E c \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![c] = offsets[c] + (clocks[b] - clocks[c])]
        /\ \E d \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![d] = offsets[d] + (clocks[c] - clocks[d])]
        /\ \E e \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![e] = offsets[e] + (clocks[d] - clocks[e])]
        /\ \E f \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![f] = offsets[f] + (clocks[e] - clocks[f])]
        /\ \E g \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![g] = offsets[g] + (clocks[f] - clocks[g])]
        /\ \E h \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e, f} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![h] = offsets[h] + (clocks[g] - clocks[h])]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e, f, g} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (clocks[h] - clocks[i])]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E k \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![k] = offsets[k] + (clocks[j] - clocks[k])]
        /\ \E l \in 1..N \ {i, j, k, l, m, n, o, p, q, r, s, t, u, v, w, x, y, z, a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![l] = offsets[l] + (clocks[k] - clocks[l])]

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ \E p \in free:
             /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
             /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
             /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
                /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                /\ free' = free \cup {p}
        \/ /\ free' = free
           /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter

---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
